reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the Space Shuttle that Bill Nelson flew on as a Payload Specialist.
2. Determine the year that shuttle first launched and return the year.
original_final_question: Bill Nelson flew as a Payload Specialist on a Space Shuttle launched for the first time in what year? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which Space Shuttle did Bill Nelson fly on as a Payload Specialist? Evidence: Bill Nelson: He flew as a Payload Specialist on the Space Shuttle "Columbia". -> Space Shuttle Columbia

Node 2: In what year did Space Shuttle Columbia launch for the first time? Evidence: Space Shuttle Columbia: It launched for the first time on mission STS-1 on April 12, 1981, the first flight of the Space Shuttle program. -> 1981
